CART.TITLE: Shopping cart
CART.DESCRIPTION: Items you added to your cart.
CART.REMOVED_ITEMS_TITLE: The following items were removed from your cart:
CART.UNAVAILABLE_ITEMS_TITLE: These items cannot be ordered (discontinued, out of stock, or removed from the catalog):
CART.LINE_OUT_OF_STOCK: This product is temporarily out of stock. Reduce the quantity or remove the line from your cart.
CART.LINE_ONLY_AVAILABLE: Only {{count}} in stock. Reduce the quantity in your cart.
CART.NO_AVAILABLE_ITEMS: There are no items available to order.
CART.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load cart. Please try again later.
CART.GUEST_ONLY: Sign in or register to purchase products.
CART.GUEST_SNACK: Sign in or register to purchase products.
CART.COUPON_USAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This coupon has reached its global usage limit.
CART.CHECKOUT_DESC: Enter delivery address and confirm order.
CART.CART_CHANGED: Cart has changed. Please review it again.
CART.COUPON_NOT_IMPLEMENTED: Coupon applying is not implemented yet.

ORDER_CHECKOUT.TITLE: Order checkout
ORDER_CHECKOUT.PLACEHOLDER: Order summary and payment will appear here. This page is under construction.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.CART_EMPTY: Your cart is empty. Add items before checkout.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.ADDRESS_MAP_HINT: Choose a saved address or add a new one for the selected delivery method.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.MAP_NO_POINTS: No pickup points for this area.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.MAP_NO_COORDS_HINT: Points without map coordinates — tap to select
ORDER_CHECKOUT.MAP_NEED_CITY: Search and select a settlement first.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.MAP_NEED_NP_TYPE: Map selection is only for Nova Poshta branch or parcel locker.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.DELIVERY_NP_POSTOMAT: Pickup at Nova Poshta parcel locker
ORDER_CHECKOUT.PASSPORT_NOTICE: Please note: order pickup may require an ID. Enter last name, first name, and patronymic exactly as in your document, and the recipient's mobile phone number.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.FILL_REQUIRED: Fill in contacts, choose an address and delivery method.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.SELECT_DELIVERY_FIRST: Choose a delivery type (Nova Poshta) first.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.ORDER_CREATE_FAILED: Could not place the order. Please try again or contact support.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.CONFLICT_ORDER_CREATION_FAILED: We couldn't place your order. Tap Purchase again. If it keeps failing, check LiqPay settings on the server or contact support.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.LIQPAY_REDIRECT_FAILED: The order was created, but redirect to LiqPay failed: the API response did not include valid data and signature fields. Confirm the CreateOrderResultDto shape on the backend.
ORDER_CHECKOUT.LIQPAY_FOOTER: After you tap Purchase, card payment is handled by LiqPay (secure redirect to the payment page).

ADDRESS.DELETE_CONFIRM: This address will be removed from your saved addresses.
ADDRESS.NP_HINT: Pick a settlement from the list by name. Warehouse and street refs come from Nova Poshta API or your NP account.
ADDRESS.CITY_SEARCH_HINT: Type part of a city name and choose one of the Nova Poshta suggestions.
ADDRESS.CITY_REQUIRED: Select a settlement from the list.
ADDRESS.CITY_REF_HINT: Required by the backend to save the address.
ADDRESS.STREET_SEARCH_HINT: Type part of a street name and pick one of the Nova Poshta suggestions.
ADDRESS.SEARCH_NO_MATCH: No matches for your search. Try different keywords.
ADDRESS.NO_ADDRESSES_FOR_DELIVERY_TYPE: No saved addresses for this delivery method. Add a new address — it will be stored for the selected type (branch, parcel locker, or courier).
ADDRESS.DEFAULT_SET: This address is now your default for checkout

ORDER_VIEW.SUCCESS_SUBTITLE: Thank you for your purchase. Order details are below.

ORDER_VIEW.REVIEW_SENT: Review submitted. It will appear after moderation.
ORDER_VIEW.REVIEW_SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the review. Please try again.

ORDER_VIEW.REVIEW_APPROVED_LOCKED: This review is already approved and cannot be edited.
ORDER_VIEW.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load the order. Please try again later.
ORDER_VIEW.MISSING_ORDER_ID: Order id is missing from the link.
ORDER_VIEW.AWAIT_LOGIN: Log in or register using the menu at the top of the page to view this order.
ORDER_VIEW.LOGIN_CANCELLED: To view this order, sign in as the order owner using the menu at the top of the page.

REVIEWS_PAGE.TITLE: Reviews moderation
REVIEWS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Filter and sort reviews on the current page. Unmoderated reviews can be allowed or rejected; published or rejected reviews can only be deleted.
REVIEWS_PAGE.FILTER_HINT: Moderation, product name, and rating filters apply to the loaded page. Column headers sort the current page.
REVIEWS_PAGE.APPROVE_ALL_NONE: Nothing to approve for the current filters.
REVIEWS_PAGE.DELETE_MSG: Remove this review for “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.

USER.TITLE: Users
USER.DESCRIPTION: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions

CONFIRM_DELETE.TITLE: Delete item?
CONFIRM_DELETE.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.

STATS.DESCRIPTION: Sales and operations overview with interactive charts

CATEGORY.TITLE: Categories
CATEGORY.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove catalog categories
CATEGORY.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
CATEGORY.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name only.
CATEGORY.IMAGE_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
CATEGORY.NAME: Name
CATEGORY.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted depending on linked products.

ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.TITLE: Attribute groups
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove groups of product attributes (e.g. General, Dimensions).
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.EMPTY: No attribute groups yet. Click “Add group”.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name and slug.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted. Linked attributes may be removed or soft-deleted depending on usage.

PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.TITLE: Product attributes
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.DESCRIPTION: Define attributes (name, type, filters) within attribute groups. Values per product come later.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.EMPTY: No attributes yet. Create at least one attribute group, then add an attribute.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.NO_GROUPS_HINT: Create an attribute group first — attributes must belong to a group.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: English is the base name stored on the attribute; Ukrainian is a translation.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted if used by products.

PRODUCT.TITLE: Products
PRODUCT.DESCRIPTION: Product catalog: filters, search, stock, media, and attribute values.
PRODUCT.EMPTY: No products yet, or nothing matches the filters.
PRODUCT.SEARCH_HINT: Use either search or filtering — not both at once.
PRODUCT.ATTR_VALUES_HINT: Text to search within attribute values.
PRODUCT.ATTR_FILTER_STRING_EMPTY: Enter a value for the filter.
PRODUCT.ATTR_FILTER_LIST_EMPTY: Enter at least one valid value.
PRODUCT.ATTR_FILTER_DECIMAL_LIST_HINT: Comma-separated numbers; use a dot for decimals, e.g. 1.5, 2, 10.25
PRODUCT.ATTR_FILTER_RANGE_EMPTY: Enter at least one bound (from or to).
PRODUCT.TABLE_SORT_HINT: Sorting: click a column header (↑↓). Price, rating, and sales are sorted on the server; other columns only within the current page.
PRODUCT.MAIN_IMAGE_HINT: Upload a file — a storage key will be saved. For the detail gallery, use the section below after saving the product.
PRODUCT.STOCK_NO_CHANGE: No change applied (zero delta or same value).
PRODUCT.STOCK_ADJUST_ERROR: Could not adjust stock. Check the adjust-stock API or permissions.
PRODUCT.ATTR_VALUE_PICK_HINT: Select an attribute in the list above.
PRODUCT.ATTR_VALUE_SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the attribute value.
PRODUCT.MEDIA_ADD_ERROR: Could not add media to the product.
PRODUCT.MEDIA_AFTER_SAVE: After saving the product, gallery, videos, and attributes will be available.

BRAND.TITLE: Brands
BRAND.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove catalog brands
BRAND.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
BRAND.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name only.
BRAND.LOGO_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
BRAND.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted depending on linked products.

PROMOTION.TITLE: Promotions & discounts
PROMOTION.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage promotions: product or cart level, conditions, discount, validity, coupons.
PROMOTION.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load the promotions list. Please refresh the page or try again later.
PROMOTION.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: Base name and description (EN) follow the same pattern as categories; add Ukrainian translation. The table shows the base name.
PROMOTION.IMAGE_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
PROMOTION.DATES_ORDER_ERROR: Start date must be before end date.
PROMOTION.CONCURRENCY_ERROR: Data was changed or deleted (save conflict). Close the form, refresh the list, and open the promotion again.
PROMOTION.DATES_EQUAL_ERROR: Start and end cannot be the same instant.
PROMOTION.DATES_RANGE_HINT: Both fields are moments in your local time. Before sending, the earlier instant is used as the start and the later as the end (field order does not matter).
PROMOTION.PRODUCT_CONDITIONS_HINT: Search by name or paste GUIDs in the advanced section. Empty restrictions mean all products that match the promotion.
PROMOTION.CART_CONDITIONS_HINT: Minimum total and quantity; optionally restrict products or categories by name search or GUIDs.
PROMOTION.PICKER_SEARCH_HINT: At least 2 characters. Pick from the list — the ID is added automatically.
PROMOTION.COUPON_ASSIGNMENTS_EMPTY: No users assigned yet. Search below and add an assignment.
PROMOTION.COUPON_USER_SEARCH: Search users (email or name, min. 2 characters)

TASKS_PAGE.TITLE: Tasks
TASKS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Tasks for admins and moderators: assign, complete, or cancel.
TASKS_PAGE.EMPTY: No tasks match the selected filters.

ORDERS_PAGE.TITLE: Orders
ORDERS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Browse all orders, filter by status and dates, and change sorting. Open an order to update its status or cancel it when needed.
ORDERS_PAGE.EMPTY: No orders match the current filters.
ORDERS_PAGE.DETAIL_NOT_FOUND: Order not found or access denied.
ORDERS_PAGE.ADDRESS_ID_HINT: Optional: GUID to rebind the address per PUT OrderUpdateDto.

PAYMENTS_PAGE.TITLE: Payments
PAYMENTS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Paged payment list (GET /api/payments) with filters — Admin and Moderator. Open payment details with the Details button in the table. Cancel and refund follow backend rules.
PAYMENTS_PAGE.LIST_NOT_AVAILABLE: The current API has no GET endpoint for a full payments list. Use the field below with a known UUID from an order, logs, or the backend.
PAYMENTS_PAGE.LOOKUP_HINT: Click Load or press Enter. You can also open this page with ?paymentId=… in the URL.
PAYMENTS_PAGE.LIST_404_BACKEND: API returned 404: there is no GET /api/payments/admin/all route. Add this endpoint on the backend (or change the base path in payment.service.ts to match Swagger).
PAYMENTS_PAGE.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load payment. Check id or access.
PAYMENTS_PAGE.CANCEL_MSG: Available for failed or pending payments per backend rules.
PAYMENTS_PAGE.REFUND_HINT: Amount is optional (full refund). Reason is optional.

SUBSCRIPTIONS_PAGE.TITLE: Newsletter subscribers

SUBSCRIPTIONS_PAGE.DELETE_NOT_FOUND: No active subscription found for this email.

CONTACTS.SUBTITLE: A music instruments store for professionals and beginners
CONTACTS.WHO_WE_ARE_TEXT: We are a team passionate about music, helping you find the best instruments.
CONTACTS.MISSION_TEXT: To provide quality instruments and service for every musician.
CONTACTS.SUCCESS_EMAIL: Thank you! We have received your message. Expect a reply at the email address you provided.

DELIVERY.TITLE: Payment & Delivery
DELIVERY.SUBTITLE: Choose the convenient delivery and payment method for your order

SELF_PICKUP.TITLE: Self Pickup (Chernivtsi)
SELF_PICKUP.DESCRIPTION: You can pick up your order at our office.
SELF_PICKUP.PAYMENT_3: LiqPay or bank transfer to FOP account

COURIER.TITLE: Courier Delivery (Chernivtsi)
COURIER.DESCRIPTION: Orders over 4000 UAH are delivered free of charge. Our staff will deliver to your address, check the package, and provide documents.

NOVA_BRANCH.TITLE: Nova Poshta (to branch)
NOVA_BRANCH.DESCRIPTION: Payment options: Privat24, LiqPay, afterpayment, or bank transfer. Delivery according to carrier schedule.

NOVA_ADDRESS.TITLE: Nova Poshta (to address)
NOVA_ADDRESS.DESCRIPTION: Delivery cost is determined by carrier. Estimated delivery: 2–4 days. Payment via selected method.

DELIVERY.CHECK_TEXT: Check the completeness, packaging, and integrity of the goods upon receipt.

PAYMENT.BANK: Bank transfer to FOP account (no commission)

DELIVERY.IMPORTANT_TEXT: After leaving the pickup point or releasing the courier, you agree the goods were delivered correctly. Any claims made afterward will not be accepted.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Leveleo Chernivtsi — next-generation music hypermarket
ABOUT.INTRO_TEXT: Leveleo Chernivtsi is a modern music hypermarket offering a wide range of musical instruments, sound, lighting, and studio equipment across Ukraine. Thanks to a professional team, high-quality products, and advanced technologies, our store holds a leading position in the market.
ABOUT.CATALOG_TEXT: Our catalog includes a wide variety of musical instruments and equipment: from rare instruments to advanced professional studio solutions, meeting the needs of any customer.
ABOUT.PRICING_TEXT: We offer products for both beginners and professionals. Regular sales and promotions allow customers to purchase high-quality equipment at the best prices.
ABOUT.SUPPORT_TEXT: Our technical support team is always ready to assist. You can contact us anytime via phone or website for professional advice.
ADVANTAGES: Warranty and certified quality for all products
Fast and secure delivery across Ukraine
Return and exchange according to legislation
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: We aim to deliver emotions through music by providing quality service, reliable instruments, and a comfortable shopping experience.

RETURNS.TITLE: Returns & Exchange
RETURNS.INTRO: According to Ukrainian consumer protection law, you can return goods within 14 days if all conditions are met.
RETURNS.GOOD_QUALITY_NOTE: The item must be in new condition without scratches or signs of use.
RETURNS.BAD_QUALITY_TEXT: If defects are found during warranty period, you may request:
RETURNS.DELIVERY_TEXT: Shipping cost is paid by customer according to carrier тарифs.
IMPORTANT_LIST: Only unused items can be returned
Refund goes to original payment method
Refund time — up to 10 business days
RETURNS.FINAL_NOTE: Only unused items without damage are accepted. Otherwise return may be rejected.

TERMS.TITLE: Terms of Use
TERMS.SUBTITLE: Please read the rules for using the Leveleo online store
TERMS.WARNING: Attention! Please read these terms before using the website. If you disagree — do not use the site.
TERMS.SECTION_1_TEXT: Leveleo provides access to browse and purchase products.
TERMS.SECTION_2_3: We are not liable for damages
TERMS.SECTION_3_2: User is responsible for account security
TERMS.SECTION_6_TEXT: We process data according to Ukrainian law.
TERMS.SECTION_7_TEXT: We use cookies to improve the website.
TERMS.SECTION_8_TEXT: We may update terms at any time.

SERVER_ERROR.TITLE: Server error
SERVER_ERROR.DESC: Try refreshing the page or come back later.
